tasks.title: 4-node ping test
tasks.description: Simple connectivity test across all 4 nodes.

tasks.title: Dog tracker service — deploy and E2E test
tasks.description: YOLO + ByteTrack + ONVIF PTZ dog tracking service. Dev builds code, DGX2 hosts and runs the service, hassio provides camera credentials, macmini runs E2E QA tests. Service should auto-start in IDLE (2fps scanning), transition to TRACKING when dog detected, control camera PTZ to keep dog centered.

assigned_agents.hub: code complete — service, tests, deploy script, bug fixes delivered
assigned_agents.dgx2: service running — auto-start, ONVIF connected, scanning at 2fps
assigned_agents.macmini: E2E testing complete — 11/12 pass, 1 fail (double-start bug)
